description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores node_modules/, and define variables APP_NAME, CLUSTER_NAME, DOCKER_DRIVER, IMG_NAME, LISTENING_PORT, NAMESPACE, SERVICE_NAME, SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, and VERSION. Include a before_script that exports SHORT_SHA from the first eight characters of CI_COMMIT_SHA and echoes CI_COMMIT_SHA and CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. Define two stages, build and package. In the build stage add an ng-build job (image: trion/ng-cli-karma) that runs "ls -al", "npm install", "./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --prod --configuration=production", then lists the dist folder, and publishes the dist/ directory as an artifact; the job runs on shared runners. In the package stage add a docker-build job that depends on ng-build, runs "ls -al", "ls -al dist", logs into the registry with "docker login -u ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} ${CI_REGISTRY}", builds the image with "docker build -f Dockerfile.flightchainui -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE} --build-arg PROJECT=${CI_PROJECT_NAME} --build-arg VERSION=${VERSION} .", tags it as "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest" and "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${VERSION}.${SHORT_SHA}", pushes it with "docker push ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}", and runs on shared runners.
